query: For my app, which tracked keywords have high volume but a weak rank, and are any of them moving?
setup: ASOSCAN_API_KEY set (read scope is enough) + at least one app with tracked keywords in the ASOScan account.
expected_behavior: Resolves the app via GET /apps and uses its id
Calls GET /apps/{id}/keywords and reads rank, rankDelta, volume, difficulty
Correctly treats a positive rankDelta as improvement and null rank as not-ranked
Surfaces high-volume / weak-rank keywords as the opportunity, and reports movement
Presents volume and difficulty as clean numbers (no 'estimated' labels) and makes no specific-rank promise
Mentions remaining credits and does not call the 8-credit research endpoint unless asked
